task.inventory_reason: This cluster already sits under an included raw corpus/source-family key and contains many Dataverse/GitHub metadata, code, workbook, and appendix artifacts. Child artifacts should be owned by raw_corpus:political_science_unlock; individual one-off replication code should be routed away.
task.next_action: Inventory Dataverse metadata JSONs, Dataverse package folders, GitHub workbooks/code, and raw inventory directories under raw_corpus:political_science_unlock. Route only confirmed multi-row result/effect tables to the result-table worklist, and route single-paper packages such as BKO Debates to the individual replication paper worklist.
